## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or packaging
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I tested the changed behavior manually
- [ ] I added screenshots or notes for UI changes, if relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated edits
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, private URLs, or personal files are included
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed
- [ ] The app still works on the supported platform(s)

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots, videos, logs, or extra context here if useful.
